programmes.show_description: In 1984, with MTV in full swing, music videos were a thrilling blend of creativity & innovation with artists like Prince, Madonna & Michael Jackson.

programmes.show_name: The Heritage Chart with Mike Read
programmes.show_description: Another episode of the Heritage Chart - new music by heritage acts! With Mike Read.
In 1984, with MTV in full swing, music videos were a thrilling blend of creativity & innovation with artists like Prince, Madonna & Michael Jackson.
2nd November 1987 saw the release of one of the best selling albums of all time - George Michael's Faith. And here's every video from the album - in order!
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1987!
Legends like Diana, Lionel and Prince mix with smooth sounds from Sade, Anita Baker and Imagination in our two-hour '80s funk and soul session!
Strap yourself in as Andy takes you back to late 80s teatime on BBC1 - Blue Peter, Grange Hill & Neighbours - plus 30 of the very best feel-good chart bangers from that era!
A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!

programmes.show_name: It Spent HOW Long At No.1?!
programmes.show_description: Once these tracks made it to the top spot there was no knocking them off! This is our countdown of the 50 longest chart toppers of the 1980s!
You may have had his poster on your wall in the '80s, but who were Jason and his teen mates sticking up in their bedrooms? From 1980-1989, these are the decade's poster girls and boys.
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
What was in the top five during the Easter holiday in the '80s? We choose three mega-hits from each year, 1980 to 1989, with Madonna, David Bowie, Bros, The Jam, Culture Club and more!
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
From London's West End to the Manhattan skyline, via Belfast, Rio, Vienna, Bangkok, Japan, China and Egypt - this is Captain Jenny's wander around the world... in song titles!
As the clocks go forward, non-stop '80s party classics to welcome in British Summertime! Long nights and happy times!
U2's first decade of hits - including the three glorious videos from 1987's classic album 'The Joshua Tree.'
Non-stop '80s rock - all day! From Queen, Bon Jovi and Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, U2, The Damned and Billy Idol.
Counting down the decade's greatest frontmen in rock and pop, with some of the most memorable tracks of the 80s. Big hair, big lips, big egos, big voices, and big anthems galore!
Non-stop '80s rock - all day! From Queen, Bon Jovi and Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, U2, The Damned and Billy Idol.
Mark Goodier brings you our exclusive chart of the 100 biggest rock songs of the 80s, based on streaming data, historic sales info, and enduring global appeal. Crank this up LOUD!
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With The Tourists, Elvis Costello, Dexy's, Dr Hook & Donna Summer.
An hour from the kings of 80s synth - Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark.
Who better to present a definitive countdown of 80s synthpop classics than OMD frontman Andy McCluskey? From Kraftwerk, Ultravox & Gary Numan to New Order, Yazoo and Pet Shop Boys.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
